installCommand: if [ -f package.json ] && [ -d frontend ]; then npm install; else cd .. && npm install; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f package.json ] && [ -d frontend ]; then npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/shared && npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/frontend; else cd .. && npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/shared && npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/frontend; fi
